data.body:
Plan-review remediation (PASS, advisories triaged):

1. [ac-quality / P6 — valid] 'clean pass' made measurable: a CLEAN shadow pass = a pass whose `baseline_shadow_check` log records `divergent == 0` (no per-binding baseline diverges from its prev_snapshot-derived value over the 5 mirrored fields). The Phase-3 consumer swap is gated on >= 10 CONSECUTIVE such clean passes; any `baseline_shadow_divergence` event resets the counter to 0.

2. [indeterminate / E2 — valid] The 7 known drift instances are enumerated (from the 2026-07-03 derisk census on the epic):
   - 5x archived->Done (class A / TERMINAL_TRANSITION): REB-464, REB-456, REB-465, REB-466, REB-457
   - 1x GC-after-grace (class C / RETIRE_AFTER_GRACE): f8b5-2f30 -> REB-530
   - 1x adopt (class B / ADOPT): REB-532
   Phase 4's capped live heal targets exactly this set; next-pass census must show 0 acting decisions over it.
